title: Influenza Shift Drift Explained
script_summary: Unravel the science behind influenza shift drift in a concise manner.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about influenza shift drift.
Influenza viruses constantly change through two main processes: shift and drift.
Drift is a gradual change, while shift leads to major mutations, creating new strains.
Research indicates that drift can affect vaccine effectiveness each year.
Understanding this helps scientists predict outbreaks and improve vaccines.
Want to stay updated on science? Hit follow and explore more!
